demographicMetrics.value: Techno Exponent (T-Web Exponent Services Pvt. Ltd)

winningHooks: Hook style "Educational" is your top engagement driver, achieving an average engagement rate of 1.73%.
"Building In Public" hooks also perform well, yielding 738 average impressions per post.
winningTopics: Posts covering "SaaS" show the highest resonance with your audience, leading other topics in average engagement.
Content focused on "Startups" is a strong second, with a solid 1.47% engagement rate.
recommendations: Increase output of "SaaS" posts using a "Educational" styled hook structure to capture high engagement early.
Refine lower-performing categories (e.g., "Building In Public" hooks) by keeping the opening line shorter (under 80 characters).
Aim to include a single question or controversial assertion in your opening line to lift comment rates.
